highlights.title: GenerationService
highlights.description: Orchestration layer for pipeline-driven content generation: resolve prompt template, fetch RAG messages, call LLM, and persist results to generation_runs table.

highlights.title: ProviderService & LangChain Adapter
highlights.description: Provider-agnostic LLM abstraction with LangChain backend supporting OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, and Ollama models with unified async interface.

highlights.title: Scheduler Run-Now
highlights.description: Add trigger-now action to the scheduler web UI and CLI so pipelines can be executed on demand without waiting for the next scheduled interval.

highlights.title: Logging Hardening
highlights.description: Replace all silent except Exception: pass clauses in pipeline routes with logger.warning/exception calls to surface errors in production logs.
